caption: A man with a beard and short hair, wearing a black t-shirt, is featured in a video stream overlaying a website page. He is positioned in a small rectangular window in the lower right of the screen, sitting in front of a plain wall. The background website is for "CASEBREAKS.COM" and "WWW.JAEPYCASEBREAKS.COM," displaying a sales listing for "*19X CROWN ROYALE PYT #5 TEAM GIVEAWAY* -- 2021-22 PANINI MOSAIC BASKETBALL HOBBY 1-PACK BREAK #54 *RT*" priced at "$83.99." A chat sidebar on the right shows messages from "Nightbot" and "Ohi," with Ohi stating, "Thought this was a 10 spot giveaway filler!" The man remains largely stationary throughout the sequence, looking toward the camera with a neutral expression. There are no significant changes in his position, the text, or the overall scene across the frames.
